steps.title: Use the student's goal
steps.content: The student wants to specify which countries the Danube River passes through. The relevant notes name Hungary and Romania, so the selected sentence must include both countries.

steps.title: Reject off-goal facts
steps.content: B discusses world ranking only indirectly. C gives length and European rank. D gives the world rank. None of those choices specifies the countries named in the notes.

steps.title: Name both countries
steps.content: The sentence identifying Hungary and Romania directly satisfies the student's goal. The answer is A.
